baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Set up a Redis provider through projects.dev and give me the env variable names.
evals.expected_output: A non-interactive Stripe Projects workflow that verifies provider support, initializes the project, delegates to the local CLI skill, and reports env variable names only.
assertions: Checks projects.dev/providers before running CLI commands.
Prints env variable names without secret values.
